allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); \(async \(\) => { const meta = await sharp\('src/assets/Pantera_Claw.webp'\).metadata\(\); console.log\('Pantera_Claw.webp:', meta.width, 'x', meta.height\); const meta2 = await sharp\('public/Pantera_Claw_hero.webp'\).metadata\(\); console.log\('Pantera_Claw_hero.webp:', meta2.width, 'x', meta2.height\); }\)\(\);")
